definition: Codebase-only headline for core-mobile: weighted blend of Appium spec→feature-folder breadth (token/stem/describe), required flow×wallet cells from required-scenarios.config.json (flows and walletModes from that file; invalid weight numbers fall back to defaults with a warning), and folder×wallet-slot assumption (N = walletModes.length). Ledger is not automatable in Appium. TestRail is not part of this number.
